text: Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) is the flagship company of Adani Group, one of India’s largest business organisations.
context_prefix: This chunk is from AEL disclosure pack, Q2 FY26 and H1-26 results, describing business segments, consolidated income, EBITDA drivers, and airport performance. It may include PDF text, OCR table text, or NVIDIA visual page analysis.

text: Over the years, Adani Enterprises has focused on building emerging infrastructure businesses, contributing to nation-building and divesting them into separate listed entities.
context_prefix: This chunk is from AEL disclosure pack, Q2 FY26 and H1-26 results, describing business segments, consolidated income, EBITDA drivers, and airport performance. It may include PDF text, OCR table text, or NVIDIA visual page analysis.

text: Having successfully built sizeable and scalable businesses like Adani Ports & SEZ, Adani Energy Solutions, Adani Power, Adani Green Energy, Adani Total Gas and Adani Wilmar, the company has contributed to make India self-reliant with our robust businesses.
context_prefix: This chunk is from AEL disclosure pack, Q2 FY26 and H1-26 results, describing business segments, consolidated income, EBITDA drivers, and airport performance. It may include PDF text, OCR table text, or NVIDIA visual page analysis.

text: This has also led to significant returns to our shareholders for three decades.
context_prefix: This chunk is from AEL disclosure pack, Q2 FY26 and H1-26 results, describing business segments, consolidated income, EBITDA drivers, and airport performance. It may include PDF text, OCR table text, or NVIDIA visual page analysis.

text: The next generation of its strategic business investments are centered around green hydrogen ecosystem, airport management, data center, roads and primary industries like copper and petrochem - all of which have significant scope for value unlocking.
